data.content: Plan addresses both the primary bug (reqwest follows full redirect chain to CDN, losing the release tag URL) and the latent bug (root-relative Location header resolution). Fix: use a no-redirect client in resolve_latest_tag() to stop at the first 3xx hop, and fix redirected_location() to properly resolve root-relative paths using url::Url::join(). All changes in one file (update.rs) with new unit tests. Ready for plan review.
